text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 11. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
